name: tlc-erp-suite
description: TLC ERP Suite - Full-Stack Coaching Management System

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "SERVER,CLIENT" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.vercel-build: npm install --include=dev --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
